title: Dashboard Countdown Widget Connection to a Board
excerpt: As a user I want to have a Countdown widget in my Dashboard. I need to have it connected to a Date or Timeline Milestone in a Board. When the date or Milestone shift I want the Countdown widget on my Dashboard to automat…

posts.author: MaartenGroot (Maarten)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a user I want to have a Countdown widget in my Dashboard. I need to have it connected to a Date or Timeline Milestone in a Board. When the date or Milestone shift I want the Countdown widget on my Dashboard to automatically change.
The current option for a Countdown to be a manually entered date that needs to be manually changed on the Dashboard is not acceptable for your users who expect automations from Monday.com

posts.author: Brianne (Brianne Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! I would love this to be able to connect to an item’s due date and to be dynamic

posts.author: kcastaneda (Kacey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love this too! It seems kind of odd that this isn’t already a built in feature with this app.

I recently built a dashboard to help manage 7 different projects and had to build out 7 separate countdowns to track key deadlines in all 7 projects. But since those aren’t actually connected to anything, any changes to those deadlines after I created them have to be completely manually which adds more complications to the dashboard than I would like.

I love the concept of the countdown widget but having it connect to a real date within a project in a must.
